name: Clawline Browser Agent
description: AI browser agent powered by local Claude API

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:* https://api.anthropic.com https://*.openclaws.co.uk; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:;
